arts.ttl: Preview: Inter Milan vs. Lazio - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Serie A clash between Inter Milan and Lazio, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

With two rounds left, Inter sit just one point of Napoli in this exciting title race, after they defeated Torino 2-0 despite starting with a heavily rotated lineup. On the other hand, Lazio are still...
